algorithm_adjustment_recommendations.recommendation: When trigger_status=triggered, display low_event_draw_cluster, balanced_one_goal_cluster, open_draw_cluster, favorite_edge_cluster, underdog_edge_cluster, volatility_tail_cluster before or alongside exact Top5.
If Top1 is 1-1 and favorite 1X2 probability is below 0.48, label as dual-path. If Top1 is 1-1 but favorite probability is above 0.48, label as raw-grid artifact and lead with favorite-edge cluster.
This layer is a reporting and scoreline-cluster layer; do not move W/D/L probabilities unless separate tactical or market evidence supports it.
